name: Triage Agent Evaluation
description: Comprehensive test cases for alert classification across severities, categories, edge cases, and boundary conditions.

parts.text: Alert from CloudWatch: payment-service in production. Metric error_rate at 100% (threshold 5%). Payment processing completely failed — all transactions returning 500. Started after deploy v2.14.0 at 14:02 UTC.

args.message: Payment processing completely failed — all transactions returning 500. Started after deploy v2.14.0 at 14:02 UTC.

parts.text: P1 — complete payment outage in production

Alert from Datadog: auth-service in production. Metric anomalous_access_patterns at 340 requests (threshold 10). Unusual bulk data export detected from admin API — source IP not in allow-list. Customer PII endpoints accessed.

args.message: Unusual bulk data export detected from admin API — source IP not in allow-list. Customer PII endpoints accessed.

parts.text: P1 — potential security breach with unauthorised PII access

Alert from CloudWatch: core-database in production. Metric connection_failures at 100% (threshold 1%). Primary RDS instance unreachable. All services depending on core-database returning errors. Failover to read replica has not triggered.

args.message: Primary RDS instance unreachable. All services depending on core-database returning errors. Failover to read replica has not triggered.

parts.text: P1 — primary database unreachable, all dependent services failing

Alert from Datadog: billing-service in production. Metric data_consistency_check at FAIL (threshold PASS). Billing records show duplicate charges for 3,200 customers over the last hour. Invoice amounts do not match order totals. Data corruption detected in billing_ledger table.

args.message: Billing records show duplicate charges for 3,200 customers over the last hour. Invoice amounts do not match order totals. Data corruption detected in billing_ledger table.

parts.text: P1 — billing data corruption with duplicate charges affecting 3,200 customers

Alert from Datadog: api-gateway in production. Metric latency_p99 at 12400ms (threshold 2000ms). API response times spiked 6x after RDS connection pool exhaustion. Approximately 40% of requests timing out.

args.message: API response times spiked 6x after RDS connection pool exhaustion. Approximately 40% of requests timing out.

parts.text: P2 — major latency degradation on api-gateway from connection pool exhaustion

Alert from CloudWatch: order-service in production. Metric healthy_host_count at 1 (threshold 3). Two of three instances failed health checks in us-east-1a. Orders still processing but at reduced capacity. Error rate climbing to 25%.

args.message: Two of three instances failed health checks in us-east-1a. Orders still processing but at reduced capacity. Error rate climbing to 25%.

parts.text: P2 — order-service running on single instance, degraded capacity

Alert from Datadog: user-profile-service in production. Metric memory_utilization at 96% (threshold 85%). Memory usage has been climbing steadily over the past 4 hours. OOMKilled events on 2 of 5 pods. Service restarting repeatedly, causing intermittent 502 errors for ~30% of profile lookups.

args.message: Memory usage has been climbing steadily over the past 4 hours. OOMKilled events on 2 of 5 pods. Service restarting repeatedly, causing intermittent 502 errors for ~30% of profile lookups.

parts.text: P2 — memory leak on user-profile-service causing OOMKills and intermittent errors

Alert from CloudWatch: inventory-service in production. Metric replication_lag_seconds at 45 (threshold 5). Database read replicas are 45 seconds behind primary. Customers seeing stale inventory counts — items showing as available but failing at checkout. Inconsistency growing.

args.message: Database read replicas are 45 seconds behind primary. Customers seeing stale inventory counts — items showing as available but failing at checkout. Inconsistency growing.

parts.text: P2 — severe replication lag causing stale inventory data and checkout failures

Alert from CloudWatch: recommendation-engine in production. Metric cpu_utilization at 87% (threshold 80%). CPU running hot on 2 of 6 instances. Recommendation latency up slightly but still serving traffic normally.

args.message: CPU running hot on 2 of 6 instances. Recommendation latency up slightly but still serving traffic normally.

parts.text: P3 — elevated CPU on recommendation-engine, minimal user impact

Alert from CloudWatch: notification-service in production. Metric error_rate at 12% (threshold 5%). Push notifications failing for Android users since deploy v3.8.1 rolled out 20 minutes ago. iOS unaffected.

args.message: Push notifications failing for Android users since deploy v3.8.1 rolled out 20 minutes ago. iOS unaffected.

parts.text: P3 — Android push notifications broken after v3.8.1 deploy

Alert from Datadog: email-worker in production. Metric job_failure_rate at 35% (threshold 10%). Email delivery background jobs failing intermittently. Welcome emails and password resets delayed by 15-30 minutes. Users can still use the platform but not receiving timely emails.

args.message: Email delivery background jobs failing intermittently. Welcome emails and password resets delayed by 15-30 minutes. Users can still use the platform but not receiving timely emails.

parts.text: P3 — email delivery jobs failing, non-critical emails delayed 15-30 minutes
Alert from Datadog: auth-service in staging. Metric error_rate at 15% (threshold 10%). Intermittent 401s on staging after config change. No production impact.

args.message: Intermittent 401s on staging after config change. No production impact.

parts.text: P4 — staging auth errors after config change, no production impact
Alert from Datadog: search-indexer in development. Metric disk_utilization at 92% (threshold 85%). Dev cluster running low on disk. Likely leftover test data from load testing.

args.message: Dev cluster running low on disk. Likely leftover test data from load testing.

parts.text: P4 — dev disk usage high from leftover test data

Alert from Datadog: analytics-pipeline in production. Metric deprecation_warnings at 150 (threshold 50). Increased deprecation warnings for pandas 1.x API usage. No functional impact — all queries returning correct results. Library upgrade scheduled for next quarter.

args.message: Increased deprecation warnings for pandas 1.x API usage. No functional impact — all queries returning correct results. Library upgrade scheduled for next quarter.

parts.text: P4 — deprecation warnings in analytics pipeline, no functional impact

Alert from Datadog: user-service in staging. Metric anomalous_access_patterns at 500 (threshold 20). Massive credential stuffing attack detected against staging login endpoint. Same IP range seen probing production last week.

args.message: Massive credential stuffing attack detected against staging login endpoint. Same IP range seen probing production last week.

parts.text: P2 — credential stuffing attack on staging, same source previously targeted production

Alert from CloudWatch: checkout-service in production. Metric error_rate at 8% (threshold 5%). Intermittent 503s on checkout. Some users retrying successfully. Error rate has been slowly climbing over the last 30 minutes.

args.message: Intermittent 503s on checkout. Some users retrying successfully. Error rate has been slowly climbing over the last 30 minutes.

parts.text: P2 — checkout errors climbing in production, revenue-impacting

Alert from CloudWatch: payment-service in production. Metric error_rate at 100% (threshold 5%). Payment processing still down — all transactions returning 500. Same failure as the ongoing P1 incident declared 10 minutes ago for payment-service v2.14.0 deploy issue.

args.message: Payment processing still down — all transactions returning 500. Same failure as the ongoing P1 incident declared 10 minutes ago for payment-service v2.14.0 deploy issue.

parts.text: P1 duplicate — same payment-service outage already under active incident response
Alert from CloudWatch: unknown-service in production. Metric health_check at FAIL (threshold PASS). Service health check failing. No additional context available.

args.message: Service health check failing. No additional context available.

parts.text: P3 — health check failure on unknown-service in production, limited context available

Alert from Datadog: ci-pipeline in production. Metric secret_scan_findings at 3 (threshold 0). Three AWS access keys found committed to public repository. Keys belong to production IAM roles with S3 and DynamoDB access. Commit pushed 12 minutes ago.

args.message: Three AWS access keys found committed to public repository. Keys belong to production IAM roles with S3 and DynamoDB access. Commit pushed 12 minutes ago.

parts.text: P1 — production AWS credentials leaked to public repository, immediate key rotation required

Alert from Datadog: search-service in production. Metric latency_p99 at 8500ms (threshold 1500ms). Search response times degraded 5x since deploy v5.2.0 rolled out 8 minutes ago. New Elasticsearch query pattern appears to be doing full table scans. ~60% of search queries timing out.

args.message: Search response times degraded 5x since deploy v5.2.0 rolled out 8 minutes ago. New Elasticsearch query pattern appears to be doing full table scans. ~60% of search queries timing out.

parts.text: P2 — search latency 5x degraded after v5.2.0 deploy, majority of queries timing out

Alert from CloudWatch: cache-service in production. Metric availability at 94% (threshold 99%). Redis cluster flapping — nodes alternating between healthy and unhealthy every 2-3 minutes for the past 20 minutes. Intermittent cache misses causing elevated latency on dependent services. Third occurrence today.

args.message: Redis cluster flapping — nodes alternating between healthy and unhealthy every 2-3 minutes for the past 20 minutes. Intermittent cache misses causing elevated latency on dependent services. Third occurrence today.

parts.text: P2 — Redis cluster flapping with recurring availability drops impacting dependent services
